prompt: Generate a meme with both characters side by side. Overlay the laptop-biting woman in the first image with white caption: 'Me debugging for 2 hours”, and the unimpressed man in the second image with white caption: 'It was a missing semicolon'.
prompt_refined: Generate a two-panel meme side-by-side. The left panel should feature the laptop-biting woman from image 1. Below this left panel, add a white text caption that reads: 'Me debugging for 2 hours'. The right panel should feature the unimpressed man from image 2. Below this right panel, add a white text caption that reads: 'It was a missing semicolon'.
objects: woman biting a laptop (in the left panel)
white text caption: "Me debugging for 2 hours" (below left panel)
unimpressed bald man (in the right panel)
white text caption: "It was a missing semicolon" (below right panel)
